Title: FIN-E2 — BIR Tax Compliance Operations

Acceptance Criteria: All monthly forms filed by regulatory deadline; evidence posted to docs/evidence/.

Title: FIN-E3 — Month-End Close Operations
Description: Achieve monthly close cycle < 10 business days (kpi_003). 5-phase close with 39 tasks, team of 9, Kanban workflow. Seed: ipai_finance_close_seed. Checklist: docs/handbook/finance/month-end/checklist.md.
Acceptance Criteria: Close cycle consistently < 10 days; automation active; analytics in Superset.

Title: FIN-I3.1 — Monthly Close Cycle (Recurring Template)
Description: Template for monthly close. Clone per period. 5 phases across ~20 business days. 39 tasks assigned to 9 team members. Kanban: To Do → In Prep → Review → Approval → Done.
Acceptance Criteria: All 39 tasks completed within target timeline; period locked in Odoo.

Title: FIN-T3.1a — Phase I Pre-Close (days 1-3)
Description: Cut-off notices, download bank/credit card statements, verify invoices, reconcile petty cash, match intercompany, verify payroll, check recurring entries.
Acceptance Criteria: Pre-close checklist complete; preliminary trial balance generated.

Title: FIN-T3.1b — Phase II Transaction Close (days 3-8)
Description: Post accrued expenses, prepaid amortization, depreciation, payroll JE, intercompany settlement. Complete bank reconciliation.
Acceptance Criteria: All transaction entries posted; bank reconciliation complete.

Title: FIN-T3.1c — Phase III Reconciliation (days 8-12)
Description: AP/AR aging, fixed asset register, inventory valuation. Investigate variances > 10% from prior month.
Acceptance Criteria: All accounts reconciled; variances documented.

Title: FIN-T3.1d — Phase IV Reporting (days 12-15)
Description: Generate BS/IS/CF. Budget vs actual variance analysis. Management report with KPI dashboard.
Acceptance Criteria: Financial statements generated; variance analysis complete; management report submitted.

Title: FIN-T3.1e — Phase V Post-Close (days 15-20)
Description: Audit adjustments, period lock, archive documents, next-period setup.
Acceptance Criteria: Period locked in Odoo; documents archived; next period initialized.

Title: FIN-I3.2 — Close Automation
Description: Automate recurring close tasks via n8n workflows. Replace Mattermost with Slack integration.
Acceptance Criteria: 3 n8n automations active; Slack notifications replace Mattermost.

Title: FIN-T3.2a — Bank statement import automation (n8n)
Description: Deploy bank_statement_import.json n8n workflow. Trigger: daily 6 AM.
Acceptance Criteria: Workflow active; statements imported daily.

Title: FIN-T3.2b — Depreciation runner automation (n8n)
Description: Deploy depreciation_runner.json n8n workflow. Trigger: monthly day 4.
Acceptance Criteria: Workflow active; depreciation computed monthly.

Title: FIN-T3.2c — Update checklist Mattermost refs to Slack
Description: Update docs/handbook/finance/month-end/checklist.md to reference Slack instead of deprecated Mattermost.
Acceptance Criteria: No Mattermost references in checklist; Slack channel referenced.
